name: Can B Corp
summary: PART I Recent Developments In February 2024, our 67% owned subsidiary, Nascent Pharma, LLC (Nascent), acquired composition of matter and use patents covering liquid formulations of cannabis, including, among other things, beverages, tinctures, vape pen liquids and liquid filled capsules. Patented uses include using the liquid formulations to alleviate numerous debilitating conditions, including cancer, irritable bowel syndrome, chronic pain, post-traumatic stress disorder, anxiety, sleep disorde...
